description: Emit the serial-dilution Opentrons Protocol API v2 template (.py) into the record store.
rules: read-only — produces a local file, controls no hardware
pure Python stdlib — copies the vendored serial_dilution_template.py
writes record_store/serial_dilution.py (diluent fill, stock add, row-wise serial dilution)
usage: No vars required. Output: serial_dilution.py — edit it, then run the `simulate` perk.
limitation: Emits a static template only; it does not customize dilution factor, volumes, or step count.
